text_en: And he put the golden altar in the tent of the congregation before the vail:
text_pt: Moisés também pôs o altar de ouro na Tenda do Encontro, diante do véu,

text_en: And he burnt sweet incense thereon; as the LORD commanded Moses.
text_pt: e nele queimou incenso aromático, como o Senhor tinha ordenado.

text_en: And he set up the hanging {at} the door of the tabernacle.
text_pt: Pôs também a cortina à entrada do tabernáculo.

text_en: And he put the altar of burnt offering {by} the door of the tabernacle of the tent of the congregation, and offered upon it the burnt offering and the meat offering; as the LORD commanded Moses.
text_pt: Montou o altar de holocaustos à entrada do tabernáculo, a Tenda do Encontro, e sobre ele ofereceu holocaustos e ofertas de cereal, como o Senhor tinha ordenado.

text_en: And he set the laver between the tent of the congregation and the altar, and put water there, to wash {withal}.
text_pt: Colocou a bacia entre a Tenda do Encontro e o altar, e encheu-a de água;

text_en: And Moses and Aaron and his sons washed their hands and their feet thereat:
text_pt: Moisés, Arão e os filhos deste usavam-na para lavar as mãos e os pés.

text_en: When they went into the tent of the congregation, and when they came near unto the altar, they washed; as the LORD commanded Moses.
text_pt: Sempre que entravam na Tenda do Encontro e se aproximavam do altar, eles se lavavam, como o Senhor tinha ordenado a Moisés.

text_en: And he reared up the court round about the tabernacle and the altar, and set up the hanging of the court gate. So Moses finished the work.
text_pt: Finalmente, Moisés armou o pátio ao redor do tabernáculo e colocou a cortina à entrada do pátio. Assim, Moisés terminou a obra.

text_en: Then a cloud covered the tent of the congregation, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.
text_pt: Então a nuvem cobriu a Tenda do Encontro, e a glória do Senhor encheu o tabernáculo.

text_en: And Moses was not able to enter into the tent of the congregation, because the cloud abode thereon, and the glory of the LORD filled the tabernacle.
text_pt: Moisés não podia entrar na Tenda do Encontro, porque a nuvem estava sobre ela, e a glória do Senhor enchia o tabernáculo.

text_en: And when the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the children of Israel went onward in all their journeys: {went onward: Heb. journeyed}
text_pt: Sempre que a nuvem se erguia sobre o tabernáculo os israelitas seguiam viagem;

text_en: But if the cloud were not taken up, then they journeyed not till the day that it was taken up.
text_pt: mas se a nuvem não se erguia, eles não prosseguiam; só partiam no dia em que ela se erguesse.

text_en: For the cloud of the LORD {was} upon the tabernacle by day, and fire was on it by night, in the sight of all the house of Israel, throughout all their journeys.
text_pt: De dia a nuvem do Senhor ficava sobre o tabernáculo, e de noite havia fogo na nuvem, à vista de toda a nação de Israel, em todas as suas viagens.
